text: <par>Why is the form split between the <k> and the <h>? --mlj</par>
<par>Dumi <latinform>roː rɨ</latinform> looks exactly parallel to Tangut <latinform>rǐɑr rǐe</latinform>.</par>
<par>The semantic extension to INTESTINES is due to the coiled appearance of those organs. Cf. WB <latinform>wak-ʔu</latinform> 'screw', lit. "pig-intestine".</par>
